experiencias.descricao: Worked on the evolution of a CRM using Python/Django, working with PostgreSQL and MongoDB in a Linux environment. Developed end-to-end features with a focus on security, traceability, and system organization.
destaques: Notifications for new opportunities with real-time counters to improve lead tracking.
Permissions module (RBAC) with granular access control (view, create, edit, and delete).
File management module (CRUD) with upload, search, and filters, including audit tracking (author and timestamp).
Agile workflow using Scrum and Kanban, with Jira for organization, Git/GitHub, and Docker.
Visual redesign improving design, usability, and readability, ensuring a more intuitive interface.

experiencias.descricao: Worked in HR performing administrative routines and information control, ensuring data consistency and supporting process flow between departments.
destaques: Registration, updating, and validation of administrative processes in an internal system, ensuring accuracy and consistency.
Monitoring the physical and digital flow of processes between departments, paying attention to routing and deadlines.
Operational support for different areas, helping maintain a more organized and efficient workflow within the sector.
